summary: Iteration 13 testing completed - P1 Features: Visual Workflow Builder, Agent Learning Visibility, and NLP Agent Customization. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new learning and NLP customization endpoints working correctly
Visual Workflow Builder has all 10 node types with drag-drop functionality
Node configuration panel shows step settings with proper form controls
NLP parsing uses keyword-based matching (casual, formal, concise, detailed, etc.) - MOCKED, not full LLM
seed_data_creation: Test learnings created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully implemented and tested. Visual Workflow Builder at /visual-workflow with drag-drop canvas, 10 node types, AI generation, and node configuration panel. Learning tab in Agent Console shows NLP customization input, Agent Learnings by type, and Current Agent Settings. All backend endpoints for learning and NLP customization working.

backend_learning_summary.details: Returns total learnings, byAgent counts, byType counts, and highImpactRecent list

backend_agent_customization.details: Returns user's agent customization settings with agents and globalSettings

backend_nlp_customization.details: Parses NLP instructions and applies changes. Keywords: casual, formal, concise, detailed, aggressive, subtle

backend_learning_history.details: Returns list of agent learnings with optional agent_type filter

backend_record_learning.details: Records new learning with agentType, learningType, category, summary, details, impact

backend_agent_learnings.details: Returns learnings for specific agent with totalLearnings, successRate, categories, recentLearnings

backend_customization_history.details: Returns history of NLP customization requests

backend_learning_feedback.details: Adds user feedback and rating to a learning

frontend_visual_workflow_builder.details: Full drag-drop workflow builder with 10 node types, AI generation, zoom controls, undo/redo

frontend_node_palette.details: All 10 node types available: Trigger, Send Email, Wait, Approval, Branch, Condition, Action, Notification, Task, End

frontend_ai_workflow_generation.details: Generate with AI button opens textarea for natural language workflow description

frontend_node_configuration_panel.details: Right panel shows Configure Step with Step Name, Trigger Type dropdown, Connections info, Duplicate/Delete buttons

frontend_learning_tab.details: Learning tab in Agent Console shows NLP customization input, Agent Learnings stats, Learnings by Agent, Current Agent Settings

frontend_nlp_customization_input.details: Textarea with placeholder 'Tell agents how to behave...' and Apply Changes button

frontend_agent_learnings_display.details: Shows Total and High Impact counts, Learnings by Agent (Research, Outreach, Qualification, etc.)

frontend_current_agent_settings.details: Shows current settings for Research Agent, Outreach Agent, All Agent with personality, tone, depth, length values

mocked_apis.nlp_parsing: NLP parsing uses simple keyword matching (casual, formal, concise, detailed, aggressive, subtle) - NOT full LLM
mocked_apis.agent_task_execution: Agent tasks (research, outreach, etc.) use simulated execution - no real external API calls
mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env

test_execution_details.playwright_tests: All UI elements verified - Visual Workflow Builder, Learning tab, NLP customization
